text: Code reviews are an essential part of software development. During a code review, a developer checks a colleague's code before it is added to the main project. This simple process has several important benefits. Firstly, it helps catch bugs early, before they become bigger problems in the finished product. Secondly, code reviews encourage knowledge sharing. Junior developers learn from more experienced teammates, and everyone stays familiar with different parts of the project. Finally, this practice improves overall team quality by ensuring consistent coding standards and stronger collaboration. Good code reviews lead to better software and a more skilled team.
